packs.name: High Quality Social Media Mockup A
packs.description: Four-scene social media mockup pack with PSD views and guide PDF.
packs.notes: Mockup-only asset pack for presentation and preview rendering.

packs.name: High Quality Social Media Mockup B
packs.description: Alternate four-scene social media mockup pack with PSD views and guide PDF.
packs.notes: Mockup-only asset pack for polished launch and showcase assets.

packs.name: Business R11 Social Media
packs.description: Lightweight business social media source pack with Illustrator file and help PDF.
packs.notes: Small business template source; likely best used as inspiration or a narrow single-template import.

packs.name: Business R1 Social Media
packs.description: Business social media source pack with Illustrator, EPS, and help PDF assets.
packs.notes: Compact business source pack with slightly broader format support than the other R-series files.

packs.name: Business R32 Social Media
packs.description: Lightweight business social media source pack with Illustrator file and help PDF.
packs.notes: Small business source pack; likely useful as a narrow variation rather than a hero template set.

packs.name: Business R14 Social Media
packs.description: Lightweight business social media source pack with Illustrator file and help PDF.
packs.notes: Small business source pack in the same family as the other R-series imports.

packs.name: Baseball Social Media Banner Template
packs.description: Cross-tool social banner pack with Photoshop, XD, Figma, and Sketch source files.
packs.notes: Broader non-real-estate category import; useful for proving Posterboy can support sports and event-oriented clients too.

packs.name: Business Corporate Social Media Post Canva
packs.description: Six-slide business corporate carousel pack with PSD, AI, EPS, and Canva link support.
packs.notes: Strong candidate for broader business and professional-services template categories.

packs.name: Business Sale Social Media Post
packs.description: Six-post business sale pack with Illustrator and Photoshop source files.
packs.notes: Good candidate for promo, offer, and launch-oriented business content normalization.
